allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "node?: $\(\(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) -ne $null\)"; "npm?: $\(\(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) -ne $null\)")

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvs","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Node\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm_multishells","$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\Volta\\bin\\node.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\apps\\nodejs\\current\\node.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\.volta\\bin\\node.exe"\); foreach\($p in $paths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ "FOUND: $p" } }; "Path env contains node? $\($env:Path -match 'node'\)")

PowerShell($tmp = Join-Path $PWD '.claude\\tmp_changelog_mojibake.txt'; $out = Join-Path $PWD 'CHANGELOG.md'; $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($tmp, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding\('ISO-8859-1'\).GetBytes\($content\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($out, $bytes\); "wrote $\($bytes.Length\) bytes"; "tmp char length: $\($content.Length\)")

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\('CHANGELOG.md'\); "total=$\($bytes.Length\)"; "first 60 bytes hex:"; \($bytes[0..59] | ForEach-Object { '{0:X2}' -f $_ }\) -join ' '; "---"; "around 'ltimos' search"; $idx = -1; for\($i=0;$i -lt $bytes.Length-7;$i++\){ if\($bytes[$i] -eq 0x6C -and $bytes[$i+1] -eq 0x74 -and $bytes[$i+2] -eq 0x69 -and $bytes[$i+3] -eq 0x6D -and $bytes[$i+4] -eq 0x6F -and $bytes[$i+5] -eq 0x73\){ $idx=$i; break } }; if\($idx -gt 0\){ "found 'ltimos' at offset $idx, prev 4 bytes: $\(\(\($bytes[\($idx-4\)..\($idx-1\)] | ForEach-Object { '{0:X2}' -f $_ }\) -join ' '\)\)" } else { 'not found' })
